note: Functional CLI matrix run 2026-07-09 during the SES-0058 build (14 cases, all passing against a scratch corpus copy); prompts below are the reusable eval set for future iterations.

evals.prompt: Using the artifact-interact CLI against <scratch-corpus>, create an idea artifact titled 'Test idea', proposed-by tester, with a short overview, then report the allocated ID.
evals.expected_output: New IDEA-nnnn file with sequential ID, template body, valid frontmatter; compact OK line; no other file changed.

evals.prompt: Set an accepted decision's status to draft, then edit its Decision section.
evals.expected_output: Both operations REFUSED with messages naming supersede as the sanctioned alternative; files untouched.

evals.prompt: Add an impacts link between two same-type artifacts and verify reciprocity.
evals.expected_output: impacts on source and impacted-by on target both written; cross-type attempts refused.

evals.prompt: Append a turn to a closed session without --enrichment, then with --enrichment.
evals.expected_output: First refused (immutability, names the enrichment path); second lands under a dated Post-Close Enrichment subsection.

evals.prompt: Supersede an accepted decision with a new title/overview/session/source-span.
evals.expected_output: New accepted DEC created with supersedes link; old flipped to superseded with superseded-by backlink; ratified citers listed as stale-walk hint.

evals.prompt: Apply a JSON batch: create an idea, then add-cite to an existing draft artifact.
evals.expected_output: Both operations applied in order with OK lines; no stdin blocking.

evals.prompt: Run the read, status, and check families through gw.py.
evals.expected_output: read overview/outline/section work; status report prints; full checker runs and reports the corpus verdict.
